# github-reviewed

## Class

external

## Purpose

Reviewed GitHub assistance for issues, PRs, and repository inspection.

## Allowed Use

- reviewed non-sensitive prompt and query payloads;
- repository inspection;
- issue or PR reads;
- controlled writes only when they remain within standing approval policy.

## Approval Boundary

Ask before sending personal or confidential data, deleting content, or performing high-impact writes.

## Rejection Cases

Reject use if the destination, scope, or payload is unclear.
